title: Announcing Kanban view for Multiple Boards

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey folks,

Wanted to share that our team at ThoughtFlow has been working on a Kanban Dashboard Widget that lets you visualize items from multiple boards on a single Kanban view.

This has been a long pending request from the monaday.com community

Here’s a short demo of the app

We’re working towards getting this approved for the marketplace. Meanwhile, if you want to be notified of the launch, please click here to signup for early access . Looking forward to your feedback.

posts.author: kranthi_thoughtflow (Kranthi Kiran)
posts.cookedHtml: Thanks @CharlotteK
